title: Sit AnyWhere
description: You can literally sit everywhere you want!
body:
# Sit AnyWhere ### ⚠️ Resource Pack Required >You can literally sit anywhere you want. # 📥How to Install * **1)** Download the Data Pack * **2)** Chose the world you want to install the Data Pack in and navigate to its "_datapacks_" folder * **3)** Copy the downloaded Data Pack file (Sit AnyWhere) into this folder * **4)** Join the world and run /reload command # 📖Features With this Data Pack you can sit almost on every block. To **sit on any block**, you will first need to craft a **"Seat"** saddle, then, while **holding** it in your hand, **right-click** on the block you want to **sit on**. To **remove** a placed **"Seat"** you can just **right-click** on it with a **sword** of any type.
YouTube Showcase
# 📤Uninstall the Data Pack To uninstall the Data Pack run the command /function sit:uninstall. When the uninstallation process is completed a confirmation message will be sent in chat. ## 🔗External links
